In this episode of the Choppin’ It Up podcast, Schuler and Chief Marketing Officer Hillary Frei sit down with Bloomberg Intelligence’s senior restaurant and foodservice analyst, Michael Halen, to discuss the chain’s strong top-line growth. They also comment on product sourcing, innovation and training, as well as their three corporate values:

title_cn: 超级厄尔尼诺现象如何影响电力市场：分析师反应（播客）
summary: El Niño has officially arrived, and there are concerns this time that the weather phenomenon might be more intense than most years, a so-called “super” event. With Pacific Ocean temperatures now exceeding the threshold for one of the strongest forms of the weather pattern, the risk of prolonged heat, drought, low wind and other disruptive weather events is rising across multiple regions at once. For commodity and power markets, that can mean greater volatility, from wind droughts in Europe and h

title: Waste Management of Canada Eyes Selling C$750 Million of Bonds
title_cn: 加拿大废物管理公司计划出售 7.5 亿加元的债券
summary: Waste Management of Canada is looking to sell as much as C$750 million ($536 million) of notes as soon as this week, according to people with knowledge of the matter.

title: S&P 500 Set for Best Day Since April as Oil Sinks: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 石油下跌，标准普尔 500 指数将迎来 4 月份以来最好的一天：市场总结
summary: Stocks climbed around the world, joining gains in bonds as oil slumped after the US and Iran agreed to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, fueling hopes for an end to the conflict that has roiled markets.

title: SpaceX Jumps 11% in Second Day of Trading After Record IPO
title_cn: 创纪录的 IPO 后，SpaceX 第二天交易日股价上涨 11%
summary: SpaceX shares jumped in their second day of trading, adding to gains following a blockbuster debut that instantly vaulted it into the ranks of the world’s most valuable public companies.

title: US Stocks Rally on Deal to Reopen Strait of Hormuz; SpaceX Gains
title_cn: 美国股市因重新开放霍尔木兹海峡协议而上涨； SpaceX 收益
summary: US stocks rose sharply after the US and Iran reached an interim deal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, sending oil prices lower and easing concern about inflation ahead of Kevin Warsh’s first meeting as chairman of the Federal Reserve this week. SpaceX shares advanced, helping boost risk-on sentiment.

title: Banks Vie to Underwrite £5 Billion Intertek Buyout Debt
title_cn: 银行竞相承销 50 亿英镑 Intertek 收购债务
summary: Bankers are lining up debt packages of about £5 billion ($6.7 billion) to back a potential takeover of British product-testing firm Intertek Group Plc by private equity firm EQT AB.

title: Montreal Transit System REM to Sell Around C$2 Billion Bonds
title_cn: 蒙特利尔交通系统 REM 将出售约 20 亿加元的债券
summary: Réseau express métropolitain (REM), an automated light metro system in Greater Montreal, is looking to raise around C$2 billion ($1.43 million) in a bond sale as soon as this week, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Aluminum Slumps as Iran Peace Deal Softens Blow of Supply Crisis
title_cn: 伊朗和平协议缓解供应危机打击，铝价暴跌
summary: Aluminum slumped to the lowest in more than two months as an interim agreement between the US and Iran laid the groundwork for the resumption of metal shipments through the Strait of Hormuz.

title: US Manufacturing Output Stalls for the First Time This Year
title_cn: 美国制造业产出今年首次陷入停滞
summary: US manufacturing production stalled in May after four months of gains as a drop in chemical and petroleum output masked ongoing strength in categories tied to the data center boom.

title: Nuveen Private Bond Chief Scoops Up AI’s ‘Picks and Shovels’
title_cn: Nuveen 私人债券负责人挖掘人工智能的“镐和铲子”
summary: Data centers and computing chips are all the rage in global credit markets right now, but Nuveen LLC’s Laura Parrott is more excited about the “boring, plain vanilla” infrastructure on the outskirts of AI that will benefit regardless of how the technology pans out.

title: Knicks Win, Giving Tortured Fans First NBA Title in 53 Years
title_cn: 尼克斯队获胜，为饱受折磨的球迷带来 53 年来首个 NBA 冠军
summary:
The New York Knicks ended one of the longest championship droughts in the NBA, bringing relief to their long-suffering fans.

On Saturday night, the franchise won its first title since 1973, and third all-time, with a 94-90 win at the San Antonio Spurs in Game 5. 

Bloomberg's Annmarie Hordern was at the game and talks about the experience. 

 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: IMF Says Still on ‘High Alert’ for War Impact After Iran-US Deal
title_cn: 国际货币基金组织表示，伊朗与美国达成协议后仍对战争影响保持“高度警惕”
summary: The International Monetary Fund said it remains on “high alert” over fallout from the Middle East war on the global economy, warning that energy supplies will take time to recover even as the US and Iran announced an agreement to reopen the Strait of Hormuz.

title: Gold Jumps After US and Iran Reach Deal to Reopen Hormuz Strait
title_cn: 美国和伊朗达成协议重新开放霍尔木兹海峡后金价上涨
summary: Gold and silver rallied after the US and Iran reached an interim deal to end hostilities and reopen the Strait of Hormuz, easing global inflation fears and potentially tempering expectations for interest-rate hikes.

title: Aerospace Supplier Doncasters Seeks $746.7 Million in US IPO
title_cn: 航空航天供应商 Doncasters 在美国 IPO 寻求 7.467 亿美元融资
summary: Doncasters Group, a manufacturer of products for aerospace engines and industrial gas turbines, is seeking to raise as much as $746.7 million in an initial public offering, joining a wave of aerospace and defense companies tapping public markets amid rising demand for aircraft and military equipment.

title: Nvidia Joins AI Debt Boom With Bond Sale Targeting $20 Billion
title_cn: Nvidia 加入人工智能债务热潮，债券发行目标为 200 亿美元
summary: Chipmaking giant Nvidia Corp. is looking to sell at least $20 billion of bonds on Monday, joining a wave of companies that are borrowing as they pay for investments in the artificial intelligence boom.

title: Warsh Caught Between Trump, Bond Market Bet on Rate Hikes
title_cn: 沃什夹在特朗普与债券市场加息之间
summary:
Just three weeks into the job, Federal Reserve Chairman Kevin Warsh is already facing an unusually high-stakes test.

Inflation is roaring back at the fastest pace in three years. There’s growing dissent among the central bank’s policymakers. And investors have been dumping US Treasury bonds and piling into bets the Fed will need to start raising rates by December, defying President Trump’s call to lower them instead. 

We look ahead to this week's FOMC decision with Rebecca Patterson, Senior Fellow at the Council on Foreign Relations & former Chief Investment Strategist at Bridgewater Associates. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: What the US-Iran Deal Means for the Strait of Hormuz
title_cn: 美伊协议对霍尔木兹海峡意味着什么
summary:
Oil prices tumbled after the US and Iran agreed an interim peace deal — but key questions about the Strait of Hormuz remain.

Alex Longley explains. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oil Sinks as US-Iran Deal Boosts Outlook for Reopening of Hormuz
title_cn: 美伊协议提振霍尔木兹海峡重新开放前景，油价下跌
summary: Oil sank after the US and Iran agreed to an interim deal to reopen the Strait of Hormuz, though shipowners were still hunting for more details before committing to resuming transits.

title: Fertilizer Ships Face Long Backlog Even If Hormuz Reopens
title_cn: 即使霍尔木兹重新开放，化肥船仍面临长期积压
summary: An interim US-Iran deal to end their months-long war and potentially fully reopen the Strait of Hormuz is unlikely to immediately ease fertilizer flows as shipowners wait for more details to assess the safety of transits.

title: Europe’s Alternative to Patriot Missile Is Finding More Buyers
title_cn: 欧洲的爱国者导弹替代品正在寻找更多买家
summary: More nations are evaluating the European-made SAMP/T NG missile defense system, demonstrating the Franco-Italian interceptor’s emergence as an alternative to hard-to-get Patriot batteries from the US.

title: Said’s Al Shams Accuses Braemar Hotels of ‘Self-Dealing’
title_cn: 萨义德的阿尔·沙姆斯指责布雷马酒店“自我交易”
summary: Businessman Wafic Rida Said has criticized Braemar Hotels & Resorts Inc. over a series of recent transactions that amount to “a brazen act of self-dealing,” according to a letter sent to the real estate investment trust.

title: US Bonds Rally as Traders Trim Fed Rate-Hike Bets on Iran Deal
title_cn: 由于交易员削减美联储加息对伊朗协议的押注，美国债券上涨
summary: Treasuries advanced as investors dialed back expectations for Federal Reserve interest-rate hikes following news of a deal to halt the Iran war.

title: Thousands of Public-School Staff Across US Face Layoff Warnings
title_cn: 美国数千名公立学校员工面临裁员警告
summary: Thousands of US public-school employees have received warnings saying they could lose their jobs as the nation’s education system grapples with mounting financial pressures.

title: Airport Handler Menzies Sees High Jet Fuel Prices Through Summer
title_cn: 机场管理人员孟席斯预计夏季航空燃油价格将居高不下
summary: Airport ground-services provider Menzies Aviation Ltd. expects jet fuel costs to stay high for several more months because of fallout from the Iran war.

title: Euro Area Is Seeing Ratings Increasingly Converge, Scope Says
title_cn: Scope 称欧元区评级日益趋同
summary: The euro area is experiencing a phase of convergence across the spectrum of national credit scores despite wildly varying underlying dynamics, Scope Ratings said.

title: World Bank Makes Second Foray Into Emerging-Market CLO Funding
title_cn: 世界银行第二次进军新兴市场 CLO 融资
summary: The World Bank’s loan-backed bond program has surpassed the $1 billion mark after the lender raised another $509 million for a program aimed at supporting job creation in developing nations.

title: Nuvei Agrees to Buy Payoneer in $2.75 Billion Payments Deal
title_cn: Nuvei 同意以 27.5 亿美元的支付交易收购 Payoneer
summary: Nuvei Corp. has agreed to buy Payoneer Global Inc. for roughly $2.75 billion, forging a deal that would combine two North American payments companies that process more than half a trillion dollars in annual volume.

title: Why Solar Power Belongs on Earth
title_cn: 为什么太阳能属于地球
summary: Orbiting solar farms may sound like the future of clean energy. Bloomberg Opinion’s Mark Gongloff explains why keeping renewables on Earth is the simpler and smarter option. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: EE.UU. e Irán acuerdan detener guerra y reanudar envíos de petróleo en Medio Oriente
title_cn: 美国和伊朗同意停止战争并恢复中东石油运输
summary: E.UU. e Irán sellan un acuerdo provisional para reabrir el estrecho de Ormuz, poniendo fin a una guerra que dejó miles de muertos y abriendo 60 días de negociaciones nucleares.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Activist Investor Ananym Urges Bio-Techne to Consider Selling
title_cn: 激进投资者 Ananym 敦促 Bio-Techne 考虑出售
summary: Activist investor Ananym Capital Management has built a stake in Bio-Techne Corp. and is pushing the board to conduct a strategic review that would include a potential sale.

title: AMD Deal Helps Austrian Chip-Component Maker Extend 500% Rally
title_cn: AMD 交易帮助奥地利芯片组件制造商延续 500% 的涨势
summary: Shares in chip-part maker Austria Technologie & Systemtechnik AG rallied the most in six years after the company raised its guidance and pledged increased output and investment as part of a deal to supply Advanced Micro Devices Inc.

title: Anthropic Set to Meet Trump Officials Over AI Security Concerns
title_cn: Anthropic 将就人工智能安全问题与特朗普官员会面
summary: Anthropic PBC executives are planning to meet with Trump administration officials on Monday to discuss an unprecedented US government directive barring foreign access to the company’s most advanced artificial intelligence models, according to a person familiar with the matter.

title: Chainguard, Cyber Firms Use AI to Hunt for Open-Source Flaws
title_cn: Chainguard、网络公司使用人工智能寻找开源缺陷
summary: More than two dozen companies including JPMorgan Chase & Co. and an array of cybersecurity firms are collaborating to remedy software flaws spotted by cutting-edge artificial intelligence models.

title: Fox Will Buy Roku In Deal Worth About $22 Billion
title_cn: 福克斯将以价值约 220 亿美元的交易收购 Roku
summary: Bloomberg Intelligence media analyst Geetha Rangananthan says this deal makes a lot of strategic sense because it gives Fox more of a gateway into streaming.  The acquisition will create the third-largest player in the US television market by share of viewing, spanning broadcast, cable, local and streaming, the companies said. She appears on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Industrials Stocks Erase War Selloff, Hit Record on US-Iran Deal
title_cn: 工业股消除战争抛售，美伊协议创历史新高
summary: Shares of large US industrial companies jumped to a record Monday after the US and Iran said an interim peace deal was reached, raising hopes that the energy crisis threatening manufacturers’ and transportation firms’ profits will recede.

title: Roku-Fox Deal; Airlines Move Higher | Stock Movers
title_cn: Roku-Fox 交易；航空公司走得更高 |库存搬运工
summary:
On this episode of Stock Movers with Alexis Christoforous:

- Roku (ROKU) is higher while Fox (FOX) is declining on news Fox agreed to acquire Roku in a deal that values the streaming video platform at about $22 billion including debt.

- United Airlines (UAL) is surging with airlines stocks up around 4% ahead of the open after the U.S. and Iran reached an interim peace deal.

- Coinbase (COIN) and Robinhood (HOOD) are following Bitcoin higher amid broader risk appetite with the US-Iran interim deal. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Fox to Buy Roku at $22 Billion Value in Streaming Video Push
title_cn: Fox 将以 220 亿美元收购 Roku 进军流媒体视频领域
summary: Fox Corp. agreed to acquire Roku Inc. in a deal valued at about $22 billion including debt, creating a new television juggernaut and marking a big push into ad-supported streaming.

title: Whole Foods Unionization Upheld By US Labor Board
title_cn: 美国劳工委员会支持全食超市成立工会
summary: The US labor board ruled against Whole Foods Market’s objections to a landmark Philadelphia unionization vote, teeing up a likely yearslong legal battle over whether the Amazon.com Inc. grocery chain must collectively bargain with US employees for the first time.

title: Anthropic Shuts Down Mythos Access After US Order
title_cn: Anthropic 在美国命令后关闭 Mythos 访问
summary: The US Commerce Department imposed export controls on June 12 restricting Anthropic from offering its most advanced AI models to foreign nationals. In response, Anthropic announced it would halt access to these models for all users, citing the impracticality of policing usage on a case-by-case basis and noting that many of its employees are foreign nationals who would also be affected. Ed Ludlow has more on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Nvidia Looks to Raise $20 Billion in First Bond Sale Since 2021
title_cn: Nvidia 计划自 2021 年以来首次发行债券筹集 200 亿美元
summary: Nvidia is preparing to raise at least $20 billion through its first corporate bond sale since 2021, marketing bonds across seven tranches with maturities ranging from two to thirty years, according to people with direct knowledge of the matter. Ed Ludlow has more on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Prime Radiant Invests $50 Million in Cellares Pre-IPO
title_cn: Prime Radiant 在首次公开募股前向 Cellares 投资 5000 万美元
summary: Upstart private equity firm Prime Radiant Partners is investing $50 million in Cellares, as the biotechnology company making high-tech robots to mass-produce cancer treatments raises money ahead of a potential initial public offering in 2027.

title: Adani, Jabil Alliance to Build AI Data Center Gear in India
title_cn: 阿达尼、捷普联盟将在印度建设人工智能数据中心设备
summary: Billionaire Gautam Adani’s group has partnered with American engineering company Jabil Inc. to manufacture AI data center equipment in India as it seeks to capitalize on the country’s artificial intelligence buildout.

title: Inside the Race to Build a Compute Futures Market Bigger Than Oil
title_cn: 打造比石油更大的计算期货市场的竞赛
summary: On this episode of the Odd Lots podcast, Compute Exchange and Silicon Data CEO Carmen Li tells Joe Weisenthal and Tracy Alloway about her company's quest to build a compute market that could become bigger than oil and what goes into constructing a GPU index. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Kalshi Builds AI Agent to Stress-Test Prediction Market Bets
title_cn: Kalshi 构建 AI 代理来对预测市场赌注进行压力测试
summary: Kalshi Inc. has developed its own AI agent to help deal with a number of internal processes, including some of the thorniest issues it faces around the wording of its prediction market contracts.

title: Salesforce to Buy AI Customer Service Firm Fin for $3.6 Billion
title_cn: Salesforce 将以 36 亿美元收购 AI 客户服务公司 Fin
summary: Salesforce Inc. has agreed to buy Fin, a firm that develops artificial intelligence-powered customer agents, for about $3.6 billion as the software company works to win new business for enterprise AI.

title: How the UK Plans to Keep Children Off Social Media
title_cn: 英国计划如何让儿童远离社交媒体
summary: The UK has become the latest country to announce a ban on under-16s using social media, following a landmark law in Australia that underscored the growing pressure on governments to better protect children from online harms.

title: UK Seeks One of World’s Strictest Social Media Bans for Kids
title_cn: 英国寻求世界上最严格的儿童社交媒体禁令之一
summary: Prime Minister Keir Starmer announced what he described as a “full ban” on children using social media, going beyond limits imposed by Australia last year to create one of the strictest online crackdowns in the democratic world.

title: The ‘Potential Risks’ of AI Singled Out in Draft G7 Statement
title_cn: 七国集团声明草案中指出人工智能的“潜在风险”
summary: The Group of Seven leaders will “further discuss emerging opportunities and potential risks arising from AI, notably in the financial sector,” according to a draft statement seen by Bloomberg that’s subject to change.

title: Goldman Brings Google to Prepaid Energy Market After Equity Deal
title_cn: 高盛在股权交易后将谷歌带入预付费能源市场
summary: On the heels of arranging a record $85 billion equity-raise for Alphabet Inc., Goldman Sachs Group Inc. has scored a lesser-known victory for the tech giant in the municipal bond market.

title: Can SpaceX’s IPO Provide Liftoff for the Space Industry?
title_cn: SpaceX的IPO能否为航天工业带来升空？
summary: Rocket Lab President and CEO Peter Beck says attention generated by the record SpaceX IPO “is a good thing for the whole space industry,” as he discusses the race to raise capital in the industry and the potential timeline for data centers in space. Beck speaks on “Bloomberg Surveillance.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Can Apple’s ‘Good Enough’ Siri Compete With ChatGPT?
title_cn: Apple 的“足够好”Siri 能否与 ChatGPT 竞争？
summary: Consumers have lots of AI choices so Apple’s assistant needs to match rivals

title: US-Iran Deal to Breathe Life Into Lagging Parts of Markets, NewEdge’s Dawson Says
title_cn: NewEdge 的道森表示，美伊协议将为落后市场注入活力
summary: Cameron Dawson, CIO at NewEdge Wealth, examines the areas of the equity markets that could see the biggest potential upswings with the announcement of an agreement between the US and Iran. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Crypto Token’s 50% Wipeout Shows Scale of AI-Hacking Threat
title_cn: 加密代币 50% 被消灭显示人工智能黑客威胁的规模
summary: When Eli Ben-Sasson helped create the Zcash cryptocurrency nearly a decade ago, the cryptographer worried about human adversaries. He didn’t expect that machine intelligence would one day expose a flaw that had eluded years of expert human judgment.

title: Anthropic Export Ban Deepens Fears About US Stranglehold on AI
title_cn: 人为出口禁令加深了人们对美国压制人工智能的担忧
summary: For many politicians and technologists outside the US, their gravest fear about AI came true this weekend

title: Patsnap Said to Confidentially File for HK, Singapore Dual IPO
title_cn: Patsnap 据称将秘密提交香港、新加坡双重 IPO 申请
summary: Patsnap, an intellectual-property data provider, has filed confidentially for an initial public offering in Hong Kong and Singapore, snapping a prolonged drought for technology listings by Southeast Asian companies.

title: Xiaohongshu Is Said to Ready Hong Kong IPO Filing This Month
title_cn: 传小红书本月准备香港IPO
summary: Xiaohongshu Technology Co., the Chinese creator of social platform RedNote, is preparing to confidentially file for an initial public offering in Hong Kong by the end of this month, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: This Hated Corner of the Stock Market Is Yielding Big Returns
title_cn: 股市这个令人讨厌的角落正在带来丰厚的回报
summary: Laurence Hulse, founder and lead fund manager of Onward Opportunities, explains how he launched and grew a specialist UK small-cap investment trust despite one of the toughest environments in decades for both investment trusts and British equities. He shares his "gems among the rubble" approach to uncovering overlooked companies, discusses why UK small caps remain deeply undervalued and reveals how active engagement, artificial intelligence-powered research tools and intensive company analysis have helped his fund significantly outperform its peers. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Hungary Starts Unwinding Orban System With Term Limit, Clawback
title_cn: 匈牙利开始解除欧尔班制度的期限限制和回拨
summary: Hungary began dismantling former leader Viktor Orban’s self-styled illiberal rule by imposing term limits for premiers and winding up public trusts that wielded billions of dollars in assets in an extension of his political influence.

title: Europe Is Ready for Hormuz Mission Once Iran Peace in Place
title_cn: 一旦伊朗实现和平，欧洲已准备好执行霍尔木兹任务
summary: European leaders said they’re ready to deploy military assets to reopen the Strait of Hormuz once the peace agreement announced between the US and Iran is implemented.

title: Reform UK Vows to Hike Costs for Firms Employing Foreign Workers
title_cn: 英国改革计划誓言提高雇用外国工人的公司的成本
summary: A Reform UK government would make it more expensive for businesses to hire foreign workers by forcing them to pay a higher rate of payroll tax and a new levy for each overseas worker they employ.

title: Macron Brushes Off Trump’s 100% Tariff Threat on French Wine
title_cn: 马克龙否认特朗普对法国葡萄酒征收100%关税的威胁
summary: French President Emmanuel Macron refused to drop the country’s digital tax after Donald Trump threatened new tariffs on wine, setting the stage for a confrontation when the two leaders meet at the Group of Seven summit in Evian.

title: Trump Arrives for G7 Meeting in Evian
title_cn: 特朗普抵达埃维昂参加七国集团会议
summary: US President Donald Trump arrives at Geneva airport in Air Force One before boarding Marine One to join other heads of state at the Group of Seven summit in Evian, France. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Nigeria’s ADC Taps Ex-Minister as Abubakar’s Running Mate
title_cn: 尼日利亚ADC任命前部长为阿布巴卡尔的竞选搭档
summary: African Democratic Congress, one of Nigeria’s major opposition parties, has selected former Transport Minister Chibuike Rotimi Amaechi as the running mate to its presidential candidate, Atiku Abubakar.

title: Czech Cabinet Backs Disputed Revamp of Public Media Funding
title_cn: 捷克内阁支持有争议的公共媒体资助改革
summary: The Czech government approved an overhaul of public media funding that critics say may reduce their independence and budgets.

title: EU and France to Sign €15 Billion Defense Deal Wednesday
title_cn: 欧盟和法国将于周三签署 150 亿欧元的防务协议
summary: The European Union and France will sign a €15.1 billion ($17.5 billion) loan agreement for defense on Wednesday, European Commission President Ursula von der Leyen said.

title: Schumer Proposes Ex-Im Bank Revamp As Expiration Deadline Looms
title_cn: 随着到期期限的临近，舒默提议对进出口银行进行改革
summary: Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer and fellow Democrats are seeking to expand the US Export-Import Bank’s mission and subsidize more domestic production as talks heat up about the future of the financing agency ahead of a Dec. 31 deadline to keep its doors open.

title: US and Iran Reach Deal to Reopen Hormuz Strait This Week
title_cn: 美国和伊朗本周达成协议重新开放霍尔木兹海峡
summary: The US and Iran reached an interim peace agreement to reopen the Strait of Hormuz and move further toward ending a 15-week war that’s wrought chaos across the Middle East and reverberated through the global economy.

title: Italy’s Meloni, Japan’s Takaichi Say GCAP Jet Program on Track
title_cn: 意大利 Meloni 和日本 Takaichi 表示 GCAP 喷气机项目已步入正轨
summary: Italian Premier Giorgia Meloni and Japanese Premier Sanae Takaichi said a key fighter-jet program remained on track, despite budget strains in the UK that threaten to slow progress on the trilateral project.

title: Two Men Found Guilty of Arson Attacks Targeting Keir Starmer
title_cn: 两名男子因针对凯尔·斯塔默的纵火袭击而被判有罪
summary: Two men have been found guilty of setting fire to a vehicle and two properties linked to the UK Prime Minister in a series of arson attacks last year.

title: Gavin Newsom Rushes to Sink California Billionaire Tax Before June Deadline
title_cn: 加文·纽瑟姆 (Gavin Newsom) 急于在 6 月截止日期前减免加州亿万富翁税
summary: Governor Gavin Newsom is mounting a last-ditch pressure campaign to stop a proposed California billionaire tax from ever reaching voters.

title: Russia Hits Historic Kyiv Cathedral After Trump-Putin Call
title_cn: 特朗普与普京通话后，俄罗斯袭击了历史悠久的基辅大教堂
summary: Ukraine said a historic UNESCO-protected Orthodox cathedral in Kyiv was hit in the latest Russian drone and missile strike early on Monday, hours after Vladimir Putin and Donald Trump held a phone call.

title: UK Government Wins Appeal Over Palestine Action Terror Ban
title_cn: 英国政府赢得对巴勒斯坦行动恐怖禁令的上诉
summary: The UK ban on Palestine Action under anti-terror laws was lawful and proportionate the Court of Appeal ruled, in a boost for the government’s contentious response to pro-Palestinian activism.

title: Questions Linger Over US-Iran Deal As Trump Heads to G7
title_cn: 特朗普前往七国集团之际，美伊协议仍存疑问
summary: The president has pressed hard for a win, but many thorny issues remain

title: German Bank Chief Warns Rising Extremism Threatens Investment
title_cn: 德国银行行长警告极端主义抬头威胁投资
summary: The head of Germany’s state development bank warned that a rising tide of political extremism poses a threat to foreign investment in Europe’s biggest economy.

title: Trump Says at G7 That Hormuz Will Be Completely Open Friday
title_cn: 特朗普在七国集团峰会上表示霍尔木兹海峡将于周五完全开放
summary: Get the latest updates from the G7 Leaders' Summit in Evian, France.

title: Senegal’s Sonko Tones Down Stance on Debt, Sounds IMF Optimism
title_cn: 塞内加尔桑科缓和债务立场，听起来国际货币基金组织乐观
summary: Senegal’s National Assembly will assess any solutions for the country’s debt challenges, including a possible restructure of billions of dollars in loans, on whether they advance a broader economic-transformation agenda, Speaker Ousmane Sonko said.

title: A Sidelined G7 Awaits Trump’s Triumphant Arrival
title_cn: 旁观的七国集团等待特朗普凯旋
summary: The forum created to solve geopolitical crises was excluded from the US-Israeli planning for war on Iran and the diplomacy to end it.

title: Russia Strikes UNESCO-Protected Cathedral in Kyiv
title_cn: 俄罗斯袭击了受联合国教科文组织保护的基辅大教堂
summary: Ukraine said a historic UNESCO-protected Orthodox cathedral in Kyiv was hit by a Russian drone and missile strike early on Monday. The Kremlin's latest barrage killed four people and injured about 30 as it set apartment buildings in several parts of the city ablaze, according to local authorities and the Emergencies Ministry. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Ukraine and Moldova to Start First Phase of EU Membership Talks
title_cn: 乌克兰和摩尔多瓦将启动第一阶段欧盟成员资格谈判
summary: Ukraine and Moldova will launch the first portion of European Union membership talks, finally advancing after Hungary spent years blocking the process.

title: Pakistan to Host US-Iran Peace Deal Event in Geneva, Sharif Says
title_cn: 谢里夫表示，巴基斯坦将在日内瓦主办美伊和平协议活动
summary: Pakistan will host an event in Geneva to mark the US-Iran peace deal, Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif told parliament, crediting Army Chief Asim Munir with playing an “extraordinary role” in efforts to end a conflict that threatened to destabilize the global economy.

title: Hard to See Burnham Trade Being Pound-Friendly, SocGen Says
title_cn: 法国兴业银行表示，很难看到伯纳姆交易对英镑有利
summary: Kit Juckes, chief FX strategist at Societe Generale, discusses the outlook for this week's UK by-election and the potential impact of a leadership bid by Andy Burnham, who is trying to win a seat in parliament in Thursday's vote in Makerfield, north-west England. "It's hard to see the Burnham trade on week one, particularly if say he changes chancellor, good example, being sterling-friendly," Juckes tells Bloomberg Television. (Source: Bloomberg)
